content: I'm so excited to start learning Mandarin. I've always been fascinated by the language and culture.
That's great! What inspired you to start learning Mandarin?
I'm actually planning to move to Brazil in a few months, and I know that many Chinese people live there. I want to be able to communicate with them in their native language.
That makes sense. Brazil is a fascinating country. What do you do for work, if you don't mind me asking?
I'm a paramedic in a major city. I love my job, but I'm looking forward to a change of pace in Brazil.
That's a challenging but rewarding job. Do you have any hobbies or interests outside of work?
I'm really into mechanical keyboards and stand-up comedy. I love the feel of typing on a custom keyboard, and I enjoy making people laugh.
That's a unique combination of interests! Have you ever performed stand-up comedy before?
Yeah, I've performed at a few open mics in the city. It's a rush, but it's also terrifying. I'm thinking of starting a comedy club in Brazil when I move there.
That sounds like a great idea! Do you have any experience with running a business or event?
Actually, I used to run a small aquarium in my backyard. It was a lot of work, but it was also really rewarding. I had to learn about all the different types of fish and how to care for them.
That's impressive! I've never met anyone who's run an aquarium before. How many fish did you have?
I had around 20 fish, including some exotic species. It was a lot of fun, but also a lot of responsibility. I'm thinking of starting a new aquarium in Brazil when I move there.
That sounds like a great plan. You'll have to keep me updated on how it goes. When are you planning to move to Brazil?
I'm planning to move on June 1st. I'm excited, but also a bit nervous. It's a big change, but I'm ready for it.
